TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_CJ_Adams, title = CJ_Adams, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/CJ_Adams} }

S.FORM: CJ Adams kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, CJ Adams, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya CJ Adams mrkyas beh lottawco pulouet's. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
CJ Adams kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 4, CJ Adams, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya CJ Adams mrkyas beh lottawco pulouet's. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨ* a*ams~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨ* a*ams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨ* a*ams~ɕ mrkjas~ɕ βeħ lottawʦ~ʨo pulouetʔs~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
